title: On-demand / deferred loading
outcome: On-demand loading wired. Profiles declare [skills] allowed_skill_ids for workspace-dev and agent-safe-maintenance (review, improve, qmd, ponytail). profile.schema.json + ontarch_profile_record carry allowed_skill_ids. New bin/ontarch-skills with resolve/map; ontarch dispatches skills subcommand. resolve prints body path and appends load-log JSONL. Graph extended: skill nodes + profile -can-invoke-> skill edges. moon run ontarch:skills-map task added.
validation: ontarch skills resolve improve prints SKILLS_HOME body path + load-log line. Graph shows 8 can-invoke edges (4 skills × 2 profiles). allowed_skill_ids cross-ref enforced in validate. moon run ontarch:validate PASS.
decisions: Load logs append to registry/sessions/skill-loads.jsonl (sanctioned session-log dir)
Runtime fetch-on-call interception deferred to Cthulhu — same boundary as E05 git-push
token_note: No session starts with a skill catalog in initial prompt — profile declares invocable IDs only; body resolves on call.
